meta.name: Ezoic Brand Standards — Vol. 02 / 2026, light edition (experimental v0.1)
meta.source: Ezoic Brand Style Guide PDF (experimental v0.1) → brand-site/index.html
meta.note: Distilled for the canonical Next.js + Tailwind app. The guide PDF is the ratified spec; brand-site/index.html is its web edition. If this file and index.html ever disagree, index.html (and the live catalog at iheartezoic.com) wins — re-run the distillation.

green.usage: The mark, primary actions, signature moments. It earns every appearance. Measures 2.8:1 on light surfaces — never used as small text on cloud/white.

ink.usage: Primary text; ink surfaces (back cover, full-bleed bands, reversed-logo panels). Supersedes the draft asset-sheet value #222423 — the guide's written spec wins.

graphite.usage: Secondary text, metadata, captions, and the accessible stand-in for accent text on light surfaces.

steel.usage: Muted: quiet logo pairings, borders, page numbers, secondary text on ink.

cloud.usage: The page surface. Surfaces are cloud or ink — nothing else. White #FFFFFF and alpha/color-mix derivatives of these five values are permitted only as quiet surface tints (raised panels, washes) — never as new hues.

logo.rules: Place the supplied files as-is — never re-typeset, re-drawn, or approximated. Never recolor outside the palette, stretch, rotate, or add shadows. Never on busy imagery without an approved veil. The wordmark is never typeset — it is a file, placed.

fontDisplay.usage: Headings and display. Self-hosted, optical size 28pt. Weights in use: 900 Black / 700 Bold / 600 SemiBold.

fontText.usage: Body copy and UI. Self-hosted, optical size 18pt. Body default is 400 Regular.

fontMono.usage: Code, file paths, hex, exact values ONLY. Never decoration, never a heading or label face. Variable weight 200–900, Medium in use.

trackingHeading.usage: Headings — letter spacing −5% per the guide.

trackingBody.usage: Body — letter spacing −3% per the guide.

leadingHeading.usage: Headings — line spacing 125% per the guide.

leadingBody.usage: Body — line spacing 150% per the guide.

leadingDisplay.usage: Display exception: oversized specimen headlines mirroring the guide's own pages sit tighter than the 125% heading standard.

typography.headingConvention: Title Case, closed with a period. Nothing is set in all caps — hierarchy comes from scale and spacing, not caps, not bold runs.

pixelWash.rule: Neutrals only, one wash per surface, always under the content. A wash never carries color, never crowds the mark, and never substitutes for hierarchy.

panel.usage: Rounded panels, tiles, and swatches — the guide's pages carry soft-rounded surfaces.

band.usage: Large bands and full-width panels (the green band, reversed-logo panel).

principles.direct: Say what you mean. Cut the fog. If a claim is weak, sharpen it or drop it.
principles.confident: State verified things plainly. Confidence is about truth, not volume.
principles.technical: Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — never a generic vendor, ad network, or plugin.

terminology.Ezoic: Never EZOIC or lowercase ezoic outside logo and domain contexts.
terminology.ezID: Lowercase ez, capital ID — the identity sub-brand.
terminology.EPMV: All caps. Expand to “Earnings Per Thousand Visitors” on first use.
terminology.JS snippet: Preferred wording for the lightweight integration.
terminology.Open.Video: The period is part of the name.

gapsRequiringBrandSignoff: No approved destructive/error color exists in the declared palette. A non-brand utility red (#9A3324) remains a flagged placeholder — confirm before shipping any destructive UI.
No approved dark mode/theme exists. The system is explicitly 'light, always' — ink surfaces are local accents, not a global theme.
No approved data-visualization/chart palette exists. The chart tokens here are a conservative derivation (one green highlight + neutrals), not an approved standard.

Draft asset sheets in brand-site/assets/brand/truth-assets/ carry superseded values (ink #222423; heading/body line spacing 105%/110%). The guide PDF's written spec (#252726; 125%/150%) is the contract.
